name: get_callees
description: Return the list of symbols called by the given symbol, as resolved by the Jedi call graph. Use this to understand a symbol's dependencies and which sub-functions it delegates to.

symbol.description: Fully qualified symbol name to look up callees for (e.g. 'module.ClassName.method_name'). Returns an empty list if the symbol makes no resolvable calls or was not found.
